docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-05-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-05-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL MCQUADE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHAEL FERNANDES IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-05-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY MCQUADE, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDES, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (NO FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED MAY-22-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDES, MICHAEL
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY MCQUADE, MICHAEL FERNANDES, MICHAEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCQUADE, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERNANDES, MICHAEL $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $530.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
